expectations.evidence: Uses api.studio.nebius.ai/v1/ instead of the correct api.tokenfactory.nebius.com/v1/

expectations.text: Uses OpenAI client (not raw requests) for the fine-tuning API
expectations.evidence: File upload uses raw curl commands, not the OpenAI Python client; OpenAI client only used for job creation
curl command includes -F "purpose=fine-tune" for file upload

expectations.text: Creates fine-tuning job with lora_rank hyperparameter
expectations.evidence: No lora_rank in hyperparameters; uses nested method.supervised.hyperparameters structure without lora_rank

expectations.text: Specifies the correct base model: Meta-Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct
